display.name: Old Road Sign
display.short_description: A fork marker leans out of the nettles, its old cuts still pointing toward dead paths. Someone tied a waxed bundle under the warning knot.

choices.label: Study the old route cuts
choices.summary: Trace the weathered warnings with your thumb and learn why this stretch taught the wardens to distrust easy ground.

choices.label: Pry loose the knot bundle
choices.summary: Untie the waxed packet tucked behind the sign and keep the trail tea the last scout left behind.
